M-WEB-UI.NAME: Portal UI
M-WEB-UI.Purpose: Render the public portal that collects email input and shows request or verification outcomes.

Scope.Item: Minimal HTML/CSS/JS pages served by Cowboy
Email form, loading state, and "Проверьте почту" response
Final success and error pages after verification

Interfaces.Interface: Displays final proxy link or a human-readable error.

Risks.Risk: Frontend state can become misleading if backend errors are not surfaced clearly
